title: Alphabet Bets on Anthropic, Gains Billions: Share Value Surges to About $124 Billion
excerpt: Alphabet's bet on the AI startup Anthropic has now grown into a huge mountain. Documents disclosed on Thursday show that as of June 30, Alphabet's investments i
content_html:
Alphabet's bet on the AI startup Anthropic has now grown into a huge mountain. Documents disclosed on Thursday show that as of June 30, Alphabet's investments in a number of unnamed private companies totaled approximately $124.3 billion, and this value is almost entirely driven by its stake in Anthropic — the portion belonging to Anthropic has soared to about $124 billion, becoming one of Alphabet's most successful investments in history.

Behind these numbers are complex capital and computing power ties between two major AI giants. As the most promising challenger to OpenAI, Anthropic's Claude series has been catching up, while Alphabet is both its investor and cloud computing power provider. The seeds planted back then have grown rapidly in this wave of generative AI, and now just the paper wealth has approached $124 billion — Google's parent company has written a footnote on the return of this AI arms race with its own books.

sentences.en: Alphabet's bet on the AI startup Anthropic has now grown into a huge mountain.
sentences.zh: Alphabet 对人工智能初创公司 Anthropic 的押注现已成长为一座大山。

sentences.en: Documents disclosed on Thursday show that as of June 30, Alphabet's investments in a number of unnamed private companies totaled approximately $124.3 billion, and this value is almost entirely driven by its stake in Anthropic — the portion belonging to Anthropic has soared to about $124 billion, becoming one of Alphabet's most successful investments in history.
sentences.zh: 周四披露的文件显示，截至 6 月 30 日，Alphabet 对多家未具名私人公司的投资总额约为 1243 亿美元，而这一价值几乎完全由其在 Anthropic 的股份推动——属于 Anthropic 的部分已飙升至约 1240 亿美元，成为 Alphabet 历史上最成功的投资之一。

The seeds planted back then have grown rapidly in this wave of generative AI, and now just the paper wealth has approached $124 billion — Google's parent company has written a footnote on the return of this AI arms race with its own books.

sentences.zh: 这些数字的背后是两大人工智能巨头之间复杂的资本和计算能力联系。

sentences.en: As the most promising challenger to OpenAI, Anthropic's Claude series has been catching up, while Alphabet is both its investor and cloud computing power provider.
sentences.zh: 作为OpenAI最有希望的挑战者，Anthropic的Claude系列一直在追赶，而Alphabet既是其投资者，又是云算力提供商。

sentences.en: The seeds planted back then have grown rapidly in this wave of generative AI, and now just the paper wealth has approached $124 billion — Google's parent company has written a footnote on the return of this AI arms race with its own books.
sentences.zh: 当年埋下的种子在这波生成式AI浪潮中迅速成长，如今光是账面财富就已逼近1240亿美元——谷歌母公司用自己的书为这场AI军备竞赛的回归写下了注脚。

content_html_zh:
Alphabet 对人工智能初创公司 Anthropic 的押注现已成长为一座大山。 周四披露的文件显示，截至 6 月 30 日，Alphabet 对多家未具名私人公司的投资总额约为 1243 亿美元，而这一价值几乎完全由其在 Anthropic 的股份推动——属于 Anthropic 的部分已飙升至约 1240 亿美元，成为 Alphabet 历史上最成功的投资之一。

这些数字的背后是两大人工智能巨头之间复杂的资本和计算能力联系。 作为OpenAI最有希望的挑战者，Anthropic的Claude系列一直在追赶，而Alphabet既是其投资者，又是云算力提供商。 当年埋下的种子在这波生成式AI浪潮中迅速成长，如今光是账面财富就已逼近1240亿美元——谷歌母公司用自己的书为这场AI军备竞赛的回归写下了注脚。
